pins.title: Hong Kong: A First-Timer's Guide
pins.description: A calm first-timer's orientation to Hong Kong — the Island and Kowloon split across Victoria Harbour, the Star Ferry and Peak Tram, Kowloon's markets and temples, Lantau's Big Buddha and Ngong Ping 360, dim sum and cha chaan teng, and getting around on the Octopus card.
pins.board: Asia Travel: Japan, Vietnam, Korea & More

pins.title: Seoul: A First-Timer's Guide
pins.description: A calm first-timer's orientation to Seoul — the royal palaces of Gyeongbokgung and Changdeokgung, Bukchon Hanok Village, the moods of Myeongdong, Insadong, Hongdae and Gangnam, N Seoul Tower and the DDP, Gwangjang Market and Korean barbecue, a DMZ day trip, and getting around on T-money.
pins.board: Asia Travel: Japan, Vietnam, Korea & More

pins.title: Osaka: A First-Timer's Guide
pins.description: A calm first-timer's orientation to Osaka — Osaka Castle, Dotonbori and Namba, the Umeda Sky Building, the city's food (takoyaki, okonomiyaki, kushikatsu in Shinsekai), Universal Studios and Kaiyukan, easy day trips to Nara and Kyoto, and getting around on ICOCA.
pins.board: Asia Travel: Japan, Vietnam, Korea & More

pins.title: Penang: A First-Timer's Guide
pins.description: A calm first-timer's orientation to Penang and George Town — the UNESCO heritage shophouses and street art, the clan jetties and Khoo Kongsi, the Street of Harmony and Kek Lok Si, Penang Hill, and the island's legendary hawker food from char kway teow to assam laksa.
pins.board: Asia Travel: Japan, Vietnam, Korea & More

pins.title: Yogyakarta: A First-Timer's Guide
pins.description: A calm first-timer's orientation to Yogyakarta — the great temples of Borobudur and Prambanan, the Sultan's Kraton and Taman Sari water castle, Malioboro Street and Beringharjo market, gudeg and angkringan food, a Mount Merapi jeep tour, and getting around with Gojek and Grab.
pins.board: Asia Travel: Japan, Vietnam, Korea & More

pins.title: Tokyo: The Places Worth Your Time
pins.description: The best things to do in Tokyo for a first visit — Senso-ji and Asakusa, the Shibuya Scramble and Shibuya Sky, Harajuku and Meiji Jingu, Shinjuku's alleys, teamLab, Ueno and Akihabara, the food, and easy day trips to Kamakura, Nikko and Hakone.
pins.board: Asia Travel: Japan, Vietnam, Korea & More

pins.title: Kyoto: The Places Worth Your Time
pins.description: The best things to do in Kyoto — the thousand torii of Fushimi Inari, Arashiyama's bamboo grove, Kiyomizu-dera and the old lanes, the Golden Pavilion and the Zen gardens, Gion's geisha districts, Nishiki Market, and an easy day trip to Nara.
pins.board: Asia Travel: Japan, Vietnam, Korea & More

pins.title: Bangkok: The Places Worth Your Time
pins.description: The best things to do in Bangkok — the Grand Palace and the Emerald Buddha, Wat Pho and Wat Arun, the river and canals, Chatuchak and the night markets, Chinatown street food, the Jim Thompson House, rooftop bars, and day trips to Ayutthaya and the floating markets.
pins.board: Asia Travel: Japan, Vietnam, Korea & More
